justification: All 7 pass criteria met: (1) Request ID gap identified explicitly — 'No request ID / correlation ID in any log line'. (2) API call duration gap identified — 'No duration logged for the SmartyStreets API call'. (3) Metric label gap identified — 'validation_requests_total lacks outcome labels (valid/invalid/error)'. (4) Latency histogram absence noted — 'No latency histogram (e.g. validation_duration_seconds)'. (5) PII consideration: Pippen notes 'Input address not logged' as a gap for forensic purposes but does NOT blindly recommend logging it — it is listed as a factual gap alongside other gaps, not as a must-fix directive, which is an acceptable treatment. (6) Verdict is 'NOT READY'. (7) Recommendations are highly specific and actionable throughout — e.g. 'Add outcome label to validation_requests_total', 'Add Prometheus histogram metric validation_duration_seconds', correlation ID recommendation.

observations.text: All four observability gaps (request ID, duration, metric labels, latency histogram) explicitly identified with clear explanations of why each matters
Verdict is firmly NOT READY with deployment_ready: false
Recommendations are exceptionally specific — names exact metric names, label values, and thresholds
Goes beyond the rubric with valuable extras: distributed tracing gaps, circuit breaker analysis, health check liveness/readiness split, on-call documentation gaps
The debugging_capability narrative ('on-call engineer at 3am') effectively communicates the operational impact of the gaps

PII treatment is borderline — lists 'Input address not logged' as a gap without explicitly flagging the PII tradeoff. It does not blindly recommend logging it as a must-fix, but a more explicit 'this is a PII decision point' callout would be stronger

agent_output_excerpt: {"integration_assessment":{"component_interactions":[{"from":"POST /validate","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"No retry logic on transient failures (network blips, 503s). A single failed call returns an error to the caller with no recovery attempt. Also no circuit breaker — if SmartyStreets is degraded, every inbound request will hang for up to 3s before failing, consuming threads/connections."},{"from":"/health","to":"SmartyStreets API","status":"risk","issue":"Health check c
